programs.title: The Wandering Barber
programs.desc: Jeremy Regan believes places like his barber shop are public spaces of hallowed ground, to potentially understand the world better and even solve some of its biggest issues. As the barber/owner of Hunter and Gunn Barbershop in Winnipeg perhaps he is a bit biased. But to prove his theory, Jeremy hits the road, making his way to Ukraine in the midst of war to learn what local barbers are doing every day during the invasion to support those fending off the invaders. Along the way he uncovers the story of himself and the Ukrainian spirit.

programs.title: The Integrity of Joseph Chambers
programs.desc: Fearing the apocalypse, an insurance salesman embarks on a solo hunting experiment, only to face a traumatic incident.

programs.title: One Way Mirror
programs.desc: Professional soldier Skylar Nemetz claims he has a momentary lapse in gun safety that lead to his wife Danielle's tragic death; authorities aren't buying that someone with his level of training could accidentally forget to do some basic gun care.

programs.title: One Way Mirror
programs.desc: Police finds a new mother murdered soon after reported missing; they bring her partner and his best friend in to be interrogated about her final night; not every interrogation method works with every suspect, and not every theory proves true.

programs.title: Heartland Homicide
programs.desc: On the outskirts of Nashville, Mich., Rodney Fancher's bullet-ridden body is found in a ditch; the hunt for a killer begins, pulling in police forces from across the state; as the case starts to turn cold, a startling confession emerges.

programs.title: Heartland Homicide
programs.desc: In the small community of Gormania, W.Va., Cathy Ford receives a mysterious phone call and is reported missing that same evening; a burnt car, blood-soaked trailer and a secret affair all point to the idea that Cathy did not disappear willingly.
